bio.value: Blending head-slamming highs and tear-jerking lows, TALKHOUSE offers carefully crafted lyrics, melodies, and riffs for listeners who enjoy complexity but still know when to let go and just have fun.
A product of New York, TALKHOUSE has been tearing up stages like Arlene's Grocery, selling out the Bitter End, and headlining Mercury Lounge and more.
Stay tuned for their debut single Downtown, releasing May 10th.
